name: sas-content-hub
description: SAS-AM content campaign orchestrator. Draft articles, generate LinkedIn posts, create gated download artefacts, and publish to Webflow — all from Claude Code. Orchestrates the full pipeline: artefact creation (sas-presentation) → email-gated download (Cortex4 lead capture) → Webflow article publishing → LinkedIn promotion. Dependencies: sas-presentation, nano-banana-2.
